Our Story & Heritage

About Hassan Moustafa

Nearly two decades of engineering excellence, authentic parts integrity, and a genuine passion for every vehicle that passes through our workshop doors.

Our Mission

Engineering Integrity, Every Time

At Hassan Moustafa Automotive, we believe every vehicle deserves the same care and attention — regardless of age, brand, or service type. Founded in 2006, our workshop was built on a simple conviction: that there was a gap in the UAE market for truly honest, technically excellent, and customer-first automotive service.

Our philosophy has never changed: diagnose accurately, source genuine parts only, deliver on time, and charge fairly. Every vehicle that enters our workshop — whether a daily commuter or a collector's supercar — receives the same meticulous attention to detail.

ISO-Certified ProcessOEM Parts Only20+ Years ExperienceUAE-Wide Service
What We Stand For

Our Core Values

verified_user

Authenticity

Every part we source and install is 100% genuine, authenticated, and warranty-backed. Zero compromise on component integrity.

precision_manufacturing

Precision

We diagnose before we repair. Our process is data-driven, methodical, and documented — so you receive exact solutions, not guesswork.

handshake

Integrity

We provide accurate job timelines at the point of diagnosis. Proactive updates are sent throughout the service cycle. We never deliver late without prior communication.

currency_exchange

Fair Value

Competitive, transparent pricing with itemised quotations. We do not upsell unnecessary work — every recommendation is justified with diagnostic evidence.

Our Journey

Two Decades of Excellence

2006

Founded in Sharjah

Hassan Moustafa opened the original workshop in Industrial Area 4, Sharjah — starting with a focus on European vehicle diagnostics and genuine parts sourcing.

2006

Founded in Sharjah

Hassan Moustafa opened the original workshop in Industrial Area 4, Sharjah — starting with a focus on European vehicle diagnostics and genuine parts sourcing.

2010

ECU & Diagnostics Expansion

Invested in factory-level diagnostic equipment covering BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche and Audi platforms — one of the first independent workshops in the UAE to do so.

2010

ECU & Diagnostics Expansion

Invested in factory-level diagnostic equipment covering BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche and Audi platforms — one of the first independent workshops in the UAE to do so.

2014

OEM Parts Partnership

Established direct supply agreements with authorised OEM distributors across Europe and Japan, enabling next-day genuine parts availability for all major marques.

2014

OEM Parts Partnership

Established direct supply agreements with authorised OEM distributors across Europe and Japan, enabling next-day genuine parts availability for all major marques.

2018

Full-Service Workshop

Extended capabilities to include body and paint, comprehensive AC climate systems, and complete suspension overhaul — becoming a one-stop automotive destination.

2018

Full-Service Workshop

Extended capabilities to include body and paint, comprehensive AC climate systems, and complete suspension overhaul — becoming a one-stop automotive destination.

2023

10,000+ Vehicles Milestone

Celebrated serving over 10,000 vehicles, with a client retention rate exceeding 85% — a testament to our commitment to quality and customer relationships.

2023

10,000+ Vehicles Milestone

Celebrated serving over 10,000 vehicles, with a client retention rate exceeding 85% — a testament to our commitment to quality and customer relationships.

2026

Trusted Leader

Today, Hassan Moustafa Automotive Care stands as one of UAE's most trusted independent workshops — combining heritage expertise with cutting-edge technical capability.

2026

Trusted Leader

Today, Hassan Moustafa Automotive Care stands as one of UAE's most trusted independent workshops — combining heritage expertise with cutting-edge technical capability.

Workshop & Equipment

Our Facility

A purpose-built automotive workshop equipped with the diagnostic and mechanical tools required to service every marque to its factory standard.

Facility 01

Diagnostic Bay

State-of-the-art ECU programming, coding, and OBD scan diagnostics.

Facility 02

Mechanical & Engine Bay

Heavy-duty lifts for transmission overhauls, engine rebuilding, and chassis repairs.

Facility 03

Paint & Body Shop

Dust-free pressurized paint booths and computerised color-matching ovens.

Ready to Experience the Difference?

Book your vehicle in today and discover why thousands of UAE drivers trust Hassan Moustafa Automotive with their most valuable assets.
